op_ddeb2e19.description: 在用户名输入框输入 <username>，在密码输入框输入 <password>，然后点击登录按钮
op_ddeb2e19.assertion: All expected actions executed successfully and the page state updated to the products page after login.

op_0bc2fb91.description: 点击 Sauce Labs Backpack 卡片上的 Add to cart 按钮

actions.description: 点击 Sauce Labs Backpack 卡片上的 Add to cart 按钮

op_0bc2fb91.assertion: The 'Add to Cart' button was clicked and the button state successfully changed to 'Remove' on the first product card, indicating the action completed successfully.

op_dde19b83.description: 点击页面右上角的购物车图标

actions.description: 点击页面右上角的购物车图标

op_dde19b83.assertion: The action of clicking the shopping cart icon successfully navigated to the cart page, which is now displayed with cart content including the 'Your Cart' header and product details.

op_cb58c5be.assertion: The click on 'Checkout' button successfully navigated to the checkout information page, showing 'Checkout: Your Information' interface with form fields visible.

op_f8b6a588.assertion: All expected actions executed successfully and the page state updated to show filled checkout information form with Continue button visible.

op_f689e6c9.assertion: The page has successfully navigated to the checkout complete page after clicking 'Finish' to complete the purchase, showing 'Checkout: Complete!' and order confirmation messages.
